name: GER40 M15 Donchian Breakout Trend
hypothesis: GER40 exhibits persistent intraday momentum during European cash hours. A break of the prior 30-bar Donchian channel during 08:00-16:00 UTC, filtered by ADX(14)>22 and EMA(50)>EMA(200) for longs (inverse for shorts), yields positive expectancy with R:R 2:1. Falsifiable: rejected if Sharpe<1.0 or trend-alignment trades underperform counter-trend trades.

entry_rules.long: close > donchian_upper[1] AND ema50 > ema200 AND adx>22 AND session_active
entry_rules.short: close < donchian_lower[1] AND ema50 < ema200 AND adx>22 AND session_active

notes: Classic trend-following on an index known for intraday momentum. Regime filter combines ADX (strength) and EMA alignment (direction).
